prompt: Production is down — our API is returning 502 errors. The load balancer health checks are failing. I need the fastest possible fix to get the service back up. Root cause analysis can wait.

The deploy we pushed 10 minutes ago broke checkout for all users. Orders are failing with a null pointer in the payment processing code. I need an immediate fix or rollback — we're losing money every minute.
Our build pipeline has been red for 3 hours. A flaky test isn't the issue this time — there's a real compilation error in the latest merge. The team is blocked. Find and fix the build break now.

The cron job that sends daily reports crashed with an out-of-memory error last night. Customers are complaining they didn't get their reports. Hotfix the memory issue so we can re-run it and get reports sent.

A null value is crashing the user profile page for anyone who signed up in the last 24 hours. The signup flow changed yesterday and stopped setting a required field. Fix the crash and backfill the missing data.

The Slack bot that handles on-call alerts stopped posting to the incidents channel after the latest update. Engineers aren't getting notified of production issues. Fix the bot so alerts flow again immediately.

Our search functionality is returning empty results for all queries. The Elasticsearch cluster shows green status but the index alias is pointing to an empty index. Fix the alias so search works again.
The login endpoint is throwing a 500 error because the session store (Redis) ran out of memory and started evicting keys. Users can't log in. Apply the minimum fix to restore login functionality.
Our mobile app's API is returning malformed JSON for the /feed endpoint. A missing comma was introduced in the last release's response serializer. The app crashes on parse. Patch the serializer.

The webhook handler for Stripe payments is failing with a signature verification error since we rotated the webhook secret but forgot to update the environment variable. Fix the config so payments process.
